name: stonjourner
flavor_texts: It stands in grasslands, watching the sun’s descent from zenith to horizon. This Pokémon has a talent for delivering dynamic kicks.
Once a year, on a specific date and at a specific time, they gather out of nowhere and form up in a circle.
text: Stonjourner is the Big Rock Pokémon. It is a rock-type Pokémon. Abilities: power-spot. Base stats — HP: 100, Attack: 125, Defense: 135, Sp. Atk: 20, Sp. Def: 20, Speed: 70. Evolution line: stonjourner. Lore: It stands in grasslands, watching the sun’s descent from zenith to horizon. This Pokémon has a talent for delivering dynamic kicks. Once a year, on a specific date and at a specific time, they gather out of nowhere and form up in a circle.
